mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_violation (student_id, room_no, violation_type, violation_time, description, evidence, handle_result, handler_id) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{roomNo}, #{violationType}, #{violationTime}, #{description}, #{evidence}, #{handleResult}, #{handlerId})
mapper.select: SELECT v.*, u.real_name as student_name FROM t_violation v LEFT JOIN t_user u ON v.student_id = u.username WHERE v.id = #{id}
SELECT v.*, u.real_name as student_name FROM t_violation v LEFT JOIN t_user u ON v.student_id = u.username WHERE v.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY v.violation_time DESC
